inputs.label: Total Work Content (TWC)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all standard times for operations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 time measurement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all standard times for operations in the sewing line (ISO 9001 time measurement).

inputs.label: Number of Operators
inputs.businessContext: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total direct labor assigned to the line.

inputs.label: Takt Time
inputs.businessContext: Customer demand rate: available production time divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Customer demand rate: available production time divided by required output (Lean manufacturing).

inputs.label: Bottleneck Station Time
inputs.businessContext: Longest operation time among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

businessContext_i18n.en: Longest operation time among all stations (Theory of Constraints).

inputs.label: Line Balance Type
inputs.businessContext: Configuration of the sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

businessContext_i18n.en: Configuration of the sewing line: straight, U-shape, or modular (Lean layout principles).

inputs.label: Allow Rebalancing
inputs.businessContext: If true, the tool will suggest operator reassignment to improve balance.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, the tool will suggest operator reassignment to improve balance.

rules.message: Total Work Content must be greater than zero.
Number of Operators must be at least 1.
Bottleneck time must not exceed takt time to meet demand.
Average work per operator exceeds takt time; line cannot meet demand.

thresholds.message: Balance efficiency below 80% – significant idle time or overload.
Balance efficiency below 60% – line is severely unbalanced.
Bottleneck exceeds takt time – demand cannot be met without overtime or rebalancing.
